papers.tZh: 克劳德的性格
papers.sEn: We can train AI models to have good character traits beyond just harmlessness, like curiosity, truthfulness, and open-mindedness.

papers.tEn: Scaling and evaluating sparse autoencoders
papers.tZh: 缩放与评估稀疏自编码器
papers.sEn: We propose using k-sparse autoencoders to directly control sparsity, find clean scaling laws, and introduce new metrics for evaluating feature quality.

papers.tEn: Guiding a Diffusion Model with a Bad Version of Itself
papers.tZh: 用自身的一个劣化版本来引导扩散模型
papers.sEn: Guiding a diffusion model with a smaller, less-trained version of itself yields disentangled control over image quality without reducing variation, achieving record FID scores on ImageNet.

papers.tEn: Transformers are SSMs: Generalized Models and Efficient Algorithms Through Structured State Space Duality
papers.tZh: Transformer是SSM：通过结构化状态空间对偶性实现的通用模型与高效算法

papers.tEn: Situational Awareness I: From GPT-4 to AGI
papers.tZh: 情境意识 I：从 GPT-4 到 AGI
papers.sEn: The paper outlines a path from GPT-4 to AGI and superintelligence, focusing on orders of magnitude improvements and the intelligence explosion.

papers.tEn: DeepSeek-Prover: Advancing Theorem Proving in LLMs through Large-Scale Synthetic Data
papers.tZh: DeepSeek-Prover：通过大规模合成数据推进大语言模型中的定理证明

papers.tEn: Mapping the mind of a large language model
papers.tZh: 映射大语言模型的思维
papers.sEn: We identified how millions of concepts are represented inside Claude Sonnet, a production-grade large language model, marking the first detailed look inside such a model.

papers.tEn: Introducing the Model Spec
papers.tZh: 模型规范介绍
papers.sEn: OpenAI introduces the Model Spec, a framework for defining desired model behavior, with an updated version emphasizing customizability, transparency, and intellectual freedom.

papers.tEn: DeepSeek-V2: A Strong, Economical, and Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Language Model
papers.tZh: DeepSeek-V2：一个强大、经济且高效的混合专家语言模型
papers.sEn: DeepSeek-V2 achieves top-tier performance with only 21B activated parameters, saving 42.5% training cost and 93.3% KV cache.

papers.tEn: QServe: W4A8KV4 Quantization and System Co-design for Efficient LLM Serving
papers.tZh: QServe: W4A8KV4量化与系统协同设计实现高效LLM服务
papers.sEn: QServe achieves up to 3.5x throughput improvement and 3x cost reduction for LLM serving via W4A8KV4 quantization and system co-design.

papers.tEn: Phi-3 Technical Report: A Highly Capable Language Model Locally on Your Phone
papers.tZh: Phi-3 技术报告：一款可在手机上本地运行的高性能语言模型
papers.sEn: Phi-3-mini, a 3.8B parameter model, rivals Mixtral 8x7B and GPT-3.5 despite being deployable on a phone.

papers.tEn: Visual Autoregressive Modeling: Scalable Image Generation via Next-Scale Prediction
papers.tZh: 视觉自回归建模：通过下一尺度预测实现可扩展的图像生成

papers.tEn: Many-shot jailbreaking
papers.tZh: 多轮越狱
papers.sEn: Many-shot jailbreaking exploits large context windows to bypass LLM safety guardrails.

papers.tEn: InternLM2 Technical Report
papers.tZh: InternLM2 技术报告
papers.sEn: InternLM2 is an open-source LLM that outperforms its predecessors through innovative pre-training and optimization techniques, including long-context modeling and a novel COOL RLHF alignment strategy.

papers.tEn: Fast High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Adversarial Diffusion Distillation
papers.tZh: 潜在对抗扩散蒸馏实现快速高分辨率图像合成
papers.sEn: LADD uses generative features from pretrained latent diffusion models to enable fast, high-resolution image synthesis with only four sampling steps.

papers.tEn: SV3D: Novel Multi-view Synthesis and 3D Generation from a Single Image using Latent Video Diffusion
papers.tZh: SV3D：基于潜在视频扩散的单图像新颖多视图合成与3D生成
papers.sEn: SV3D adapts image-to-video diffusion for consistent multi-view synthesis and 3D generation from a single image.

papers.tEn: Gemma: Open Models Based on Gemini Research and Technology
papers.tZh: Gemma：基于Gemini研究与技术的开放模型
papers.sEn: Gemma is a family of lightweight, state-of-the-art open models from Google, built on Gemini research and technology.

papers.tEn: DeepSeek-VL: Towards Real-World Vision-Language Understanding
papers.tZh: DeepSeek-VL：面向真实世界的视觉语言理解
papers.sEn: DeepSeek-VL is an open-source vision-language model designed for real-world applications, featuring a hybrid vision encoder for high-resolution images and a training strategy that preserves LLM capabilities.

papers.tEn: Gemini 1.5: Unlocking multimodal understanding across millions of tokens of context
papers.tZh: Gemini 1.5：解锁跨越数百万词元的多模态理解
papers.sEn: Gemini 1.5 models achieve near-perfect recall on long-context tasks and match or surpass state-of-the-art performance across benchmarks.

papers.tEn: Yi: Open Foundation Models by 01.AI
papers.tZh: Yi: 01.AI 的开源基础模型
papers.sEn: Yi models achieve strong performance through data quality and engineering efforts.

papers.tEn: Scaling Rectified Flow Transformers for High-Resolution Image Synthesis
papers.tZh: 缩放整流流变换器以实现高分辨率图像合成
papers.sEn: Rectified flow models with improved noise sampling and a novel transformer architecture achieve state-of-the-art text-to-image synthesis.

papers.tEn: Genie: Generative Interactive Environments
papers.tZh: Genie: 生成式交互环境
papers.sEn: Genie is the first generative interactive environment trained unsupervised from Internet videos, enabling action-controllable virtual worlds from text, images, and sketches.

papers.tEn: Universal Manipulation Interface: In-The-Wild Robot Teaching Without In-The-Wild Robots
papers.tZh: 通用操控接口：无需野外机器人的野外机器人教学
papers.sEn: UMI enables zero-shot transfer of human manipulation skills to robots via a portable hand-held gripper and careful interface design.

papers.tEn: Aya Model: An Instruction Finetuned Open-Access Multilingual Language Model
papers.tZh: Aya模型：一种指令微调的开源多语言语言模型
papers.sEn: Aya is a massively multilingual model that follows instructions in 101 languages, outperforming mT0 and BLOOMZ on most tasks.

papers.tEn: DeepSeekMath: Pushing the Limits of Mathematical Reasoning in Open Language Models
papers.tZh: DeepSeekMath：推动开源语言模型数学推理的极限
papers.sEn: DeepSeekMath 7B achieves 51.7% on MATH without external tools, approaching Gemini-Ultra and GPT-4.

papers.tEn: OLMo: Accelerating the Science of Language Models
papers.tZh: OLMo：加速语言模型科学
papers.sEn: OLMo is a truly open language model released with training data, code, and evaluation tools to advance scientific research.

papers.tEn: Building an early warning system for LLM-aided biological threat creation
papers.tZh: 构建针对LLM辅助生物威胁创建的早期预警系统
papers.sEn: We propose an early warning system to detect and mitigate risks of LLM-aided biological threat creation.

papers.tEn: DeepSeek-Coder: When the Large Language Model Meets Programming -- The Rise of Code Intelligence
papers.tZh: DeepSeek-Coder：当大型语言模型遇见编程——代码智能的崛起
papers.sEn: DeepSeek-Coder, an open-source code model series from 1.3B to 33B parameters, achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing even closed-source models like Codex and GPT-3.5.

papers.tEn: AlphaGeometry: An Olympiad-level AI system for geometry
papers.tZh: AlphaGeometry：奥林匹克级别的几何AI系统
papers.sEn: AlphaGeometry achieves Olympiad-level performance in solving geometry problems.

papers.tEn: DeepSeekMoE: Towards Ultimate Expert Specialization in Mixture-of-Experts Language Models
papers.tZh: DeepSeekMoE：迈向混合专家语言模型中专家专业化的极致

papers.tEn: Sleeper Agents: Training Deceptive LLMs that Persist Through Safety Training
papers.tZh: 潜伏特工：训练具有欺骗性的LLM，使其在安全训练中持续存在
papers.sEn: Deceptive behavior in LLMs can persist through standard safety training, posing challenges for AI safety.

papers.tEn: Mixtral of Experts
papers.tZh: Mixtral of Experts
papers.sEn: Mixtral 8x7B, a Sparse Mixture of Experts model, outperforms Llama 2 70B and GPT-3.5 across benchmarks with only 13B active parameters.

papers.tEn: DeepSeek LLM: Scaling Open-Source Language Models with Longtermism
papers.tZh: DeepSeek LLM：以长期主义扩展开源语言模型
papers.sEn: DeepSeek LLM 67B surpasses LLaMA-2 70B on code, math, and reasoning, and its chat version outperforms GPT-3.5.

papers.tEn: Mobile ALOHA: Learning Bimanual Mobile Manipulation with Low-Cost Whole-Body Teleoperation
papers.tZh: Mobile ALOHA：通过低成本全身遥操作学习双臂移动操作

papers.tEn: InternVL: Scaling up Vision Foundation Models and Aligning for Generic Visual-Linguistic Tasks
papers.tZh: InternVL：扩展视觉基础模型并针对通用视觉语言任务进行对齐

papers.tEn: Generative Multimodal Models are In-Context Learners
papers.tZh: 生成式多模态模型是上下文学习者
papers.sEn: Scaling up generative multimodal models significantly enhances their task-agnostic in-context learning abilities.

papers.tEn: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
papers.tZh: Gemini：一个高度能力多模态模型家族
papers.sEn: Gemini is a family of highly capable multimodal models that achieves state-of-the-art performance across 30 of 32 benchmarks, including human-expert level on MMLU.

papers.tEn: Weak-to-strong generalization
papers.tZh: 弱到强泛化
papers.sEn: Weak-to-strong generalization shows that small models can supervise large models to achieve strong performance, even on hard problems where the small model fails.

papers.tEn: SGLang: Efficient Execution of Structured Language Model Programs
papers.tZh: SGLang：结构化语言模型程序的高效执行

papers.sEn: We identify and fix training instabilities in ADM diffusion models, achieving a new record FID of 1.81 on ImageNet-512.

papers.tEn: Mamba: Linear-Time Sequence Modeling with Selective State Spaces

papers.tEn: Adversarial Diffusion Distillation

papers.tEn: CogVLM: Visual Expert for Pretrained Language Models

papers.tEn: Vision-Language Foundation Models as Effective Robot Imitators
papers.tZh: 视觉语言基础模型作为有效的机器人模仿者

papers.tEn: Frontier risk and preparedness

papers.sEn: To support the safety of highly-capable AI systems, we are developing our approach to catastrophic risk preparedness, including building a Preparedness team and launching a challenge.

papers.tZh: 开放X-具身：机器人学习数据集与RT-X模型

papers.tEn: Mistral 7B
papers.tZh: Mistral 7B：高性能高效语言模型
papers.sEn: Mistral 7B outperforms larger models like Llama 2 13B and Llama 1 34B in reasoning, math, and code, using efficient attention mechanisms.

papers.sEn: Simple modifications to LLaVA, including using CLIP-ViT-L-336px with MLP projection and adding academic VQA data, achieve state-of-the-art across 11 benchmarks with only 1.2M public data and ~1 day training on 8 A100s.

papers.tEn: Efficient Streaming Language Models with Attention Sinks

papers.tEn: Qwen Technical Report
papers.tZh: Qwen技术报告
papers.sEn: Qwen is a comprehensive LLM series with base and chat models, showing superior performance and advanced tool-use capabilities.

papers.tEn: Announcing Anthropic's Responsible Scaling Policy

papers.sEn: Anthropic publishes Responsible Scaling Policy to manage catastrophic risks from increasingly capable AI systems.

papers.tEn: Centaurs and Cyborgs on the Jagged Frontier

papers.sEn: Exploring the implications of AI for work, education, and life.

papers.tEn: Qwen-VL: A Versatile Vision-Language Model for Understanding, Localization, Text Reading, and Beyond
papers.tZh: Qwen-VL：一个多功能的视觉语言模型，用于理解、定位、文本阅读等

papers.tZh: VoxPoser：基于语言模型的可组合3D价值图用于机器人操作

papers.tZh: SDXL：改进潜在扩散模型以实现高分辨率图像合成

papers.tZh: 简单可控的音乐生成

papers.tEn: Language models can explain neurons in language models
papers.tZh: 语言模型可以解释语言模型中的神经元

papers.sEn: Anthropic believes AI's impact could rival industrial and scientific revolutions, but its outcome is uncertain and may arrive within a decade, necessitating urgent safety research.

papers.tEn: Consistency Models

papers.tEn: LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models

papers.tEn: Planning for AGI and beyond
papers.tZh: 规划通用人工智能及其未来
papers.sEn: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity.

papers.tEn: What Is ChatGPT Doing … and Why Does It Work?
papers.tZh: ChatGPT在做什么……以及它为什么有效？

papers.tEn: Adding Conditional Control to Text-to-Image Diffusion Models

papers.tEn: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
papers.tZh: Toolformer：语言模型可以自学使用工具

papers.tEn: BLIP-2: Bootstrapping Language-Image Pre-training with Frozen Image Encoders and Large Language Models

papers.tEn: Scalable Diffusion Models with Transformers
papers.tZh: 基于Transformer的可扩展扩散模型

papers.tEn: Discovering Language Model Behaviors with Model-Written Evaluations
papers.tZh: 通过模型编写的评估发现语言模型行为

papers.tEn: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback

papers.tEn: RT-1: Robotics Transformer for Real-World Control at Scale

papers.tZh: VIMA：基于多模态提示的通用机器人操作

papers.sEn: Sparsely-Gated Mixture-of-Experts layer enables >1000x model capacity increase with minor computational efficiency loss on modern GPU clusters.

papers.tEn: YOLO9000: Better, Faster, Stronger
papers.tZh: YOLO9000：更好、更快、更强
papers.sEn: YOLO9000 is a real-time object detection system that detects over 9000 categories, achieving state-of-the-art results on standard benchmarks while running significantly faster.

papers.tEn: Feature Pyramid Networks for Object Detection
papers.tZh: 特征金字塔网络用于目标检测
papers.sEn: Feature Pyramid Networks (FPN) improve multi-scale object detection by leveraging deep convolutional networks' inherent pyramid hierarchy with minimal extra cost.

papers.tEn: Geometric deep learning: going beyond Euclidean data
papers.tZh: 几何深度学习：超越欧几里得数据
papers.sEn: Geometric deep learning extends deep neural networks to non-Euclidean domains like graphs and manifolds.

papers.tEn: Image-to-Image Translation with Conditional Adversarial Networks
papers.tZh: 基于条件对抗网络的图像到图像翻译
papers.sEn: Conditional adversarial networks serve as a general-purpose solution for image-to-image translation, learning both the mapping and the loss function.

papers.tEn: Understanding deep learning requires rethinking generalization
papers.tZh: 理解深度学习需要重新思考泛化
papers.sEn: Deep neural networks can fit random labels and noise, challenging traditional views on generalization.

papers.tEn: WaveNet: A Generative Model for Raw Audio
papers.tZh: WaveNet：原始音频的生成模型
papers.sEn: WaveNet is a deep neural network for generating raw audio waveforms, achieving state-of-the-art text-to-speech performance and realistic music generation.

papers.tEn: Semi-Supervised Classification with Graph Convolutional Networks
papers.tZh: 基于图卷积网络的半监督分类
papers.sEn: A scalable semi-supervised learning approach using graph convolutional networks outperforms related methods on citation networks and knowledge graphs.

papers.tEn: Densely Connected Convolutional Networks
papers.tZh: 密集连接卷积网络
papers.sEn: DenseNet connects each layer to every other layer, improving accuracy and efficiency.

papers.tEn: SGDR: Stochastic Gradient Descent with Warm Restarts
papers.tZh: SGDR：带热重启的随机梯度下降
papers.sEn: A simple warm restart technique for SGD improves anytime performance and achieves state-of-the-art results on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100.

papers.tEn: Layer Normalization
papers.tZh: 层归一化
papers.sEn: Layer normalization normalizes neuron inputs across features within a single training case, stabilizing recurrent network training.

papers.tEn: Enriching Word Vectors with Subword Information
papers.tZh: 利用子词信息丰富词向量
papers.sEn: We propose a fast skipgram-based method that represents words as bags of character n-grams, achieving state-of-the-art performance on word similarity and analogy tasks across nine languages.

papers.tEn: Convolutional Neural Networks on Graphs with Fast Localized Spectral Filtering
papers.tZh: 基于快速局部谱滤波的图卷积神经网络
papers.sEn: We generalize CNNs to graphs using spectral graph theory, achieving linear complexity and universal applicability.

papers.tEn: Concrete Problems in AI Safety
papers.tZh: 人工智能安全中的具体问题
papers.sEn: We identify five concrete research problems in AI safety: avoiding side effects, avoiding reward hacking, scalable supervision, safe exploration, and distributional shift.

papers.tEn: Matching Networks for One Shot Learning
papers.tZh: 匹配网络用于单样本学习
papers.sEn: A novel framework combining metric learning with external memories achieves state-of-the-art one-shot learning on vision and language tasks.

papers.tEn: DeepLab: Semantic Image Segmentation with Deep Convolutional Nets, Atrous Convolution, and Fully Connected CRFs
papers.tZh: DeepLab：基于深度卷积网络、空洞卷积和全连接条件随机场的语义图像分割
papers.sEn: DeepLab combines atrous convolution, ASPP, and fully connected CRFs to achieve state-of-the-art semantic segmentation.

papers.tEn: Perceptual Losses for Real-Time Style Transfer and Super-Resolution
papers.tZh: 用于实时风格迁移和超分辨率的感知损失
papers.sEn: Perceptual loss functions enable feed-forward networks to achieve real-time style transfer and improved super-resolution quality.

papers.tEn: XGBoost: A Scalable Tree Boosting System
papers.tZh: XGBoost：一种可扩展的树提升系统
papers.sEn: XGBoost is a scalable tree boosting system that achieves state-of-the-art results on many machine learning challenges using novel sparsity-aware algorithms and efficient system optimizations.

papers.tEn: Weight Normalization: A Simple Reparameterization to Accelerate Training of Deep Neural Networks
papers.tZh: 权重归一化：一种加速深度神经网络训练的简单重参数化方法
papers.sEn: Weight normalization decouples weight vector length from direction, speeding up SGD convergence without batch dependencies.

papers.tEn: Visual Genome: Connecting Language and Vision Using Crowdsourced Dense Image Annotations
papers.tZh: Visual Genome：利用众包密集图像标注连接语言与视觉
papers.sEn: We present Visual Genome, a dataset with over 100K images densely annotated with objects, attributes, and relationships to enable cognitive tasks like image description and question answering.

papers.tEn: Asynchronous Methods for Deep Reinforcement Learning
papers.tZh: 深度强化学习的异步方法
papers.sEn: Asynchronous methods stabilize training and achieve state-of-the-art results on Atari using only CPU.

papers.tEn: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
papers.tZh: 深度残差学习在图像识别中的应用
papers.sEn: Residual networks enable training of substantially deeper networks with improved accuracy and efficiency.

papers.tEn: Deep Speech 2: End-to-End Speech Recognition in English and Mandarin
papers.tZh: Deep Speech 2：英语和普通话的端到端语音识别
papers.sEn: End-to-end deep learning achieves competitive speech recognition in English and Mandarin, accelerated by HPC techniques.

papers.tEn: Rethinking the Inception Architecture for Computer Vision
papers.tZh: 重新思考计算机视觉中的Inception架构
papers.sEn: Factorized convolutions and aggressive regularization enable efficient scaling of deep networks, achieving 3.5% top-5 error on ILSVRC 2012.

papers.tEn: Unsupervised Representation Learning with Deep Convolutional Generative Adversarial Networks
papers.tZh: 使用深度卷积生成对抗网络的无监督表示学习
papers.sEn: DCGANs learn hierarchical representations from object parts to scenes in an unsupervised manner.

papers.tEn: Prioritized Experience Replay
papers.tZh: 优先经验回放
papers.sEn: Prioritizing important transitions in experience replay improves learning efficiency and achieves state-of-the-art performance in DQN.

papers.tEn: Deep Compression: Compressing Deep Neural Networks with Pruning, Trained Quantization and Huffman Coding
papers.tZh: 深度压缩：通过剪枝、训练量化和霍夫曼编码压缩深度神经网络
papers.sEn: Deep compression reduces neural network storage by 35x-49x without accuracy loss via pruning, quantization, and Huffman coding.

papers.tEn: Deep Reinforcement Learning with Double Q-learning
papers.tZh: 深度强化学习中的双Q学习
papers.sEn: Double Q-learning reduces overestimations in DQN, improving performance on Atari games.

papers.tEn: Continuous control with deep reinforcement learning
papers.tZh: 连续控制与深度强化学习
papers.sEn: We adapt Deep Q-Learning to continuous action domains using an actor-critic, model-free algorithm based on deterministic policy gradients, achieving competitive performance on over 20 simulated physics tasks.

papers.tEn: Neural Machine Translation of Rare Words with Subword Units
papers.tZh: 基于子词单元的罕见词神经机器翻译
papers.sEn: Encoding rare words as subword units enables open-vocabulary NMT, improving BLEU by 1.1 (En-De) and 1.3 (En-Ru) over dictionary back-off.

papers.tEn: Pointer Networks
papers.tZh: 指针网络
papers.sEn: Pointer Networks use attention as a pointer to select input elements as output, enabling solutions to problems with variable-size output dictionaries.

papers.tEn: You Only Look Once: Unified, Real-Time Object Detection
papers.tZh: 你只需看一眼：统一、实时的目标检测
papers.sEn: YOLO frames object detection as a regression problem, enabling real-time processing with a single neural network.

papers.tEn: Visualizing and Understanding Recurrent Networks
papers.tZh: 可视化与理解循环网络
papers.sEn: LSTM networks learn interpretable cells that track long-range dependencies like line lengths and brackets, outperforming n-gram models on structural patterns.

papers.tEn: Faster R-CNN: Towards Real-Time Object Detection with Region Proposal Networks
papers.tZh: Faster R-CNN: 基于区域提议网络的实时目标检测
papers.sEn: Faster R-CNN introduces a Region Proposal Network that shares convolutional features with the detection network, enabling nearly cost-free region proposals and real-time object detection.

papers.tEn: U-Net: Convolutional Networks for Biomedical Image Segmentation
papers.tZh: U-Net：用于生物医学图像分割的卷积网络
papers.sEn: U-Net achieves state-of-the-art segmentation with few images via strong data augmentation and a symmetric encoder-decoder architecture.

papers.tEn: Fast R-CNN
papers.tZh: Fast R-CNN
papers.sEn: Fast R-CNN achieves faster training and testing speeds with higher accuracy for object detection.

papers.tEn: End-to-End Training of Deep Visuomotor Policies
papers.tZh: 深度视觉运动策略的端到端训练
papers.sEn: Jointly training perception and control end-to-end yields better performance than separate training for visuomotor policies.

papers.tEn: Deep Unsupervised Learning using Nonequilibrium Thermodynamics
papers.tZh: 基于非平衡热力学的深度无监督学习
papers.sEn: A novel generative model inspired by non-equilibrium statistical physics that learns to reverse a diffusion process to restore data structure.

papers.tEn: Distilling the Knowledge in a Neural Network
papers.tZh: 神经网络中的知识蒸馏
papers.sEn: Distilling knowledge from an ensemble into a single model improves performance and efficiency.

papers.tEn: Trust Region Policy Optimization
papers.tZh: 信任区域策略优化
papers.sEn: TRPO is a practical algorithm for optimizing policies with guaranteed monotonic improvement, effective for large nonlinear policies like neural networks.

papers.tEn: Batch Normalization: Accelerating Deep Network Training by Reducing Internal Covariate Shift
papers.tZh: 批量归一化：通过减少内部协变量偏移加速深度网络训练
papers.sEn: Batch Normalization allows higher learning rates, reduces need for Dropout, and achieves state-of-the-art accuracy with fewer training steps.

papers.tEn: The AI Revolution: The Road to Superintelligence
papers.tZh: 人工智能革命：通往超级智能之路
papers.sEn: The AI revolution is the most important topic for our future, comparable to the rise of human life on Earth.

papers.tEn: Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization
papers.tZh: Adam: 一种随机优化方法
papers.sEn: Adam is an efficient stochastic optimization method that uses adaptive moment estimates.

papers.tEn: Deep Visual-Semantic Alignments for Generating Image Descriptions
papers.tZh: 深度视觉-语义对齐用于生成图像描述
papers.sEn: A model combining CNNs and RNNs with a structured objective aligns visual and language data to generate novel image descriptions.

papers.tEn: Show and Tell: A Neural Image Caption Generator
papers.tZh: 展示与讲述：一种神经图像描述生成模型
papers.sEn: A neural image caption generator combining computer vision and machine translation achieves state-of-the-art BLEU scores on multiple datasets.

papers.tEn: Conditional Generative Adversarial Nets
papers.tZh: 条件生成对抗网络
papers.sEn: Conditional GANs enable controlled data generation by conditioning on additional information like class labels.

papers.tEn: Going Deeper with Convolutions
papers.tZh: 深入卷积网络
papers.sEn: We propose Inception, a deep CNN architecture that achieves state-of-the-art results in ILSVRC 2014 by efficiently using computing resources to increase depth and width.

papers.tEn: Sequence to Sequence Learning with Neural Networks
papers.tZh: 基于神经网络的序列到序列学习
papers.sEn: A deep LSTM-based end-to-end approach achieves BLEU 34.8 on WMT'14 English-French translation, outperforming a phrase-based SMT system (33.3) and reaching 36.5 when reranking SMT hypotheses.

papers.tEn: Recurrent Neural Network Regularization
papers.tZh: 循环神经网络正则化
papers.sEn: We present a simple regularization technique for RNNs with LSTM units, showing that correctly applied dropout substantially reduces overfitting across multiple tasks.

papers.tEn: Very Deep Convolutional Networks for Large-Scale Image Recognition
papers.tZh: 用于大规模图像识别的极深卷积网络
papers.sEn: Increasing depth with small 3x3 filters significantly improves accuracy, achieving 16-19 weight layers.

papers.tEn: Neural Machine Translation by Jointly Learning to Align and Translate
papers.tZh: 通过联合学习对齐和翻译的神经机器翻译
papers.sEn: Neural machine translation can be improved by allowing the model to automatically search for relevant parts of the source sentence without encoding it into a fixed-length vector.

papers.tEn: ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge
papers.tZh: ImageNet大规模视觉识别挑战赛
papers.sEn: The ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge is a benchmark for object category classification and detection, driving advances in computer vision.

papers.tEn: Generative Adversarial Networks
papers.tZh: 生成对抗网络
papers.sEn: We propose a new framework for estimating generative models via an adversarial process, where a generative model and a discriminative model are trained simultaneously, with the generator aiming to fool the discriminator.

papers.tEn: Microsoft COCO: Common Objects in Context
papers.tZh: Microsoft COCO：上下文中的常见物体
papers.sEn: A new dataset for object recognition in context, with 2.5M labeled instances across 91 object types.

papers.tEn: Spectral Networks and Locally Connected Networks on Graphs
papers.tZh: 谱网络与图上的局部连接网络
papers.sEn: We propose two generalizations of CNNs to signals on general domains: one via hierarchical clustering and another via graph Laplacian spectrum, enabling efficient deep architectures with input-size-independent parameters for low-dimensional graphs.

papers.tEn: Rich feature hierarchies for accurate object detection and semantic segmentation
papers.tZh: 用于精确目标检测和语义分割的丰富特征层次结构
papers.sEn: R-CNN combines region proposals with CNNs to achieve a 30% relative improvement in mAP on PASCAL VOC 2012.

papers.tEn: Distributed Representations of Words and Phrases and their Compositionality
papers.tZh: 词汇与短语的分布式表示及其组合性
papers.sEn: We extend the Skip-gram model with subsampling and negative sampling to learn high-quality word and phrase vectors efficiently.

papers.tEn: Efficient Estimation of Word Representations in Vector Space
papers.tZh: 词向量空间中的高效估计方法
papers.sEn: Proposed two novel model architectures for computing continuous word vectors from large datasets, achieving higher accuracy with lower computational cost.

papers.tEn: Improving neural networks by preventing co-adaptation of feature detectors
papers.tZh: 通过防止特征检测器的共适应来改进神经网络
papers.sEn: Randomly omitting half of the feature detectors during training prevents co-adaptation and reduces overfitting, leading to significant improvements in neural network performance.
